strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of GISCollective and recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, and open-source tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research — AI exposure is recent and limited to agent tooling
Title history is Senior/Staff Developer; lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope or strategic advisory experience
No evidence of cloud-platform strategy work, executive customer advising, or advanced AI degree

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products/platforms
Director-level IC scope and strategic influence
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud-platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The candidate meets the 15-year experience bar and shows solid full-stack and infrastructure breadth, plus early AI-agent tooling work at re:cinq (MCP generators). However, the résumé shows no shipped AI products, no ML research, no cloud-platform strategy leadership, and no evidence of customer-facing advisory or Principal-level scope — titles top out at Staff/Senior Developer. The AI signal is nascent rather than 'recognized expertise.'
